business.name: BrainCore for Business
business.intro: BrainCore helps businesses develop the cognitive potential of their teams for sustainable performance.

challenges.title: Challenges you face
items: Performance barriers and productivity plateaus
Employee burnout and chronic stress
Difficulty maintaining focus and creativity
Insufficient leadership development

solution.title: How BrainCore helps
solution.description: Our platform uses neuroscience and AI to identify and develop your teams' key cognitive abilities.

difference.title: Why BrainCore is different
items: Brain data-driven performance optimization
Personalized leadership development programs
Real-time productivity and wellness tracking
Seamless integration into your work environment

outcomes.title: Expected outcomes
outcomes.description: Measurable improvement in focus, stress reduction, increased productivity, and leadership skill development.

faq.question: How long does it take to implement BrainCore in a company?
faq.answer: Implementation time depends on the size of your organization. For a pilot team of 10 to 20 people, allow approximately 2 weeks. A company-wide rollout typically takes 4 to 8 weeks, including manager training and platform customization.

faq.question: What ROI can we expect?
faq.answer: On average, our clients see a 25% increase in productivity and a 30% reduction in stress-related absenteeism within the first six months. ROI varies by industry, but most companies recoup their investment in under a year.

faq.question: Is our employees' data confidential and secure?
faq.answer: Absolutely. BrainCore is fully GDPR-compliant and adheres to Swiss data protection standards. All cognitive data is encrypted, anonymized, and hosted on secure servers in Switzerland. Employers only have access to aggregated statistics, never individual data.

faq.question: Can we start with a pilot program?
faq.answer: Of course. In fact, we recommend starting with a 3-month pilot with a small team. This allows you to concretely measure BrainCore's impact on your organization before a broader rollout.

coaching.name: BrainCore for Coaching Individuals
coaching.intro: Offer your clients neuroscience-based coaching with objective measurement and tracking tools.

faq.question: Do I need neuroscience training to use BrainCore?
faq.answer: No, no prior neuroscience training is required. Our platform is designed to be intuitive and accessible. We also offer a comprehensive onboarding program that will have you mastering all the tools within a few days.

faq.question: How does BrainCore complement my existing coaching methodology?
faq.answer: BrainCore is designed as a complement to your practice, not a replacement. Neurocognitive data enriches your sessions by providing objective measurements that strengthen your guidance, regardless of your approach (NLP, systemic coaching, etc.).

faq.question: Can I white-label the reports for my clients?
faq.answer: Yes, our coaching plan includes the ability to customize reports with your logo, colors, and visual identity. Your clients receive professional documents that reflect your brand.

faq.question: What certifications does BrainCore offer for coaches?
faq.answer: We offer a three-tier certification program: BrainCore Practitioner, Certified BrainCore Coach, and BrainCore Trainer. Each level includes theoretical and practical training, with an examination validated by our scientific board.

challenges.title: Challenges you face
items: Lack of objective measurement tools in coaching
Difficulty tracking client progress over time
Need to differentiate from other coaches
Limited scientific backing for coaching methods

solution.title: How BrainCore helps
solution.description: Our platform provides coaches with neuroscience-based tools to objectively measure and track cognitive performance.

difference.title: Why BrainCore is different
items: Neuroscience tools for objective measurement
Client progress tracking with data-driven insights
Personalized cognitive performance recommendations
Measurable results through brain activity metrics

outcomes.title: Expected outcomes
outcomes.description: Demonstrate real, quantifiable progress to your clients through cognitive performance metrics and personalized brain training.

schools.name: BrainCore for Schools
schools.intro: Integrate neuroscience into your institution for more effective and inclusive learning.

faq.question: What age groups is BrainCore suitable for?
faq.answer: BrainCore is suitable for students from age 6 through higher education. Protocols and interfaces are specifically designed for each age group, with playful exercises for younger children and more in-depth programs for teenagers and university students.

faq.question: How does BrainCore integrate into the existing curriculum?
faq.answer: BrainCore is used alongside the existing curriculum in 20- to 30-minute sessions, two to three times a week. Teachers can easily fit these sessions into their schedule without disrupting regular classes.

faq.question: What training do teachers need?
faq.answer: We offer a one-day training session for teachers covering the basics of neurofeedback and how to use the platform. Ongoing support and educational resources are then available throughout the school year.

faq.question: Are there special pricing options for schools and nonprofits?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer preferential rates for both public and private schools, as well as nonprofit organizations. Contact us for a quote tailored to the size and needs of your institution.

challenges.title: Challenges you face
items: Diverse learning needs and cognitive profiles
Difficulty measuring cognitive development objectively
Attention and concentration issues in classrooms
Need for inclusive, science-based educational tools

solution.title: How BrainCore helps
solution.description: Our platform provides neuroscience-based tools adapted for diverse learning needs to support cognitive development in schools.

difference.title: Why BrainCore is different
items: Inclusive learning tools based on neuroscience
Objective cognitive development tracking
Classroom attention pattern monitoring
Age-adapted programs from primary to university

outcomes.title: Expected outcomes
outcomes.description: Improved student concentration, better academic performance, and support for diverse learning needs through neuroscience tools.

businessCoaches.name: BrainCore for Business Coaches
businessCoaches.intro: Differentiate yourself with neuroscience tools that deliver measurable results for your professional clients.

faq.question: How is this different from the individual coaching product?
faq.answer: The Business Coaches offering is specifically designed for coaching in a professional context. It includes team analysis tools, collective performance dashboards, and protocols tailored to organizational challenges such as leadership, workplace stress management, and team dynamics.

faq.question: Can I use BrainCore with executive teams?
faq.answer: Absolutely. BrainCore is particularly effective with executive committees and leadership teams. Team cognitive mapping tools help identify complementary strengths and enhance cohesion at the highest level of the organization.

faq.question: What metrics and reports are available?
faq.answer: You have access to individual and collective cognitive performance indicators, progress reports, team dynamics analyses, and customizable dashboards. All reports can be exported and incorporated into your client presentations.

faq.question: How do I become a certified BrainCore business coach?
faq.answer: The BrainCore Business Coach certification program includes 5 days of intensive training, personalized mentoring, and a practical assessment. Prior professional coaching experience is required. Certification grants you access to all enterprise tools and the BrainCore coach network.

challenges.title: Challenges you face
items: Need to differentiate from standard coaching offerings
Clients demand measurable, data-driven results
Difficulty scaling coaching to executive teams
Lack of neuroscience tools for organizational coaching

solution.title: How BrainCore helps
solution.description: Our platform equips business coaches with neuroscience tools that deliver measurable results for executives and teams.

difference.title: Why BrainCore is different
items: Professional differentiation with neuroscience backing
Data-driven insights from brain activity analysis
Enterprise-ready scalable solutions
Evidence-based coaching strategies for executives

outcomes.title: Expected outcomes
outcomes.description: Stand out with measurable coaching results, data-driven executive development, and scalable organizational coaching solutions.

families.name: BrainCore for Families
families.hero: Cognitive wellness for the whole family
families.intro: Personalized and flexible brain training programs for every family member.

faq.question: Is BrainCore safe for children?
faq.answer: Yes, neurofeedback is a completely non-invasive method with no known side effects. BrainCore only uses passive sensors that measure brain activity. Our protocols for children are specially designed and validated by our pediatric scientific advisory board.

faq.question: Can multiple family members use the same account?
faq.answer: Yes, our family subscription allows up to 5 individual profiles on a single account. Each member has their own personalized program and progress tracking, all at a bundled rate.

faq.question: How much time per week is needed?
faq.answer: We recommend 2 to 3 sessions of 20 minutes per week for optimal results. Sessions are flexible and can be done at any time of day, easily fitting into your family's routine.

faq.question: Can BrainCore help with ADHD or learning difficulties?
faq.answer: Neurofeedback has been the subject of numerous scientific studies showing promising results for ADHD and certain learning difficulties. BrainCore offers specific protocols for attention and focus. However, we recommend consulting a healthcare professional for comprehensive support.

challenges.title: Challenges you face
items: Screen time impact on children's cognitive development
Stress and anxiety affecting family well-being
Difficulty maintaining focus for children and adults
Lack of accessible brain training solutions for families

solution.title: How BrainCore helps
solution.description: Our platform offers personalized brain training programs adapted for every family member, from children to adults.

difference.title: Why BrainCore is different
items: Programs adapted for every family member
Focus on cognitive wellness and emotional balance
Flexible sessions that fit family schedules
Safe, non-invasive brain training for children

outcomes.title: Expected outcomes
outcomes.description: Better focus, reduced stress, improved emotional balance, and enhanced cognitive wellness for the whole family.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions about BrainCore and neurofeedback.

items.question: What is neurofeedback?
items.answer: Neurofeedback is a non-invasive brain training method that uses sensors to measure brain activity in real time and provide feedback that helps the brain optimize its function.

items.question: Is BrainCore safe?
items.answer: Yes, neurofeedback is a non-invasive method with no known side effects. BrainCore only uses passive sensors that measure brain activity without sending any signals to the brain.

items.question: How long does it take to see results?
items.answer: Initial results are typically noticeable after 5 to 10 sessions. Significant and lasting improvements are typically observed after 20 to 40 sessions.

items.question: Who is BrainCore for?
items.answer: BrainCore is for everyone: businesses, coaches, schools, families, and individuals. Our solutions are adapted to each profile and goal.

items.question: How do I access the BrainCore platform?
items.answer: You can access the BrainCore platform by clicking 'Sign In' in the menu. To create an account, contact us or book a demo.

items.question: What are the prices?
items.answer: Our prices vary depending on the type of solution and number of users. Contact us for a personalized quote tailored to your needs.
